question: According to the chart, how do the total visitors at Station Z compare to those at Station X over all days shown?

options.A: Station Z has slightly more visitors than Station X, but the difference is modest.
options.B: Station Z has about twice as many visitors as Station X.
options.C: Station Z and Station X have exactly the same total number of visitors.
options.D: Station X has significantly more visitors than Station Z.

explanation: The y-axis starts at 800 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Station Z look as large as (or larger than) Station X even though the totals favor Station X.
